---
title: "Cybersecurity Hackathon"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "48-Hour Challenge for Security Enthusiasts"
description: "Join the 48-hour Cybersecurity Hackathon on June 15-16, 2025 in Bucharest, a challenge for security enthusiasts of all levels."
date: "2025-06-15"
enddate: "2025-06-16"
location: "Innovation Hub, Bucharest"
category: "hackathon"
image: "/assets/images/cyber-security.jpg"
registration_date: "2025-04-01"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:50vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Hackathon</div>
    <h1>Cybersecurity Hackathon</h1>
    <p>48-Hour Challenge for Security Enthusiasts</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center;">
      <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding:0.4rem 1rem; border-radius:99px; font-size:0.85rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 me-1"></i>June 15-16, 2025</span>
      <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding:0.4rem 1rem; border-radius:99px; font-size:0.85rem;"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i>Innovation Hub, Bucharest</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Event Overview</h2>
    <p>The Cybersecurity Hackathon is a 48-hour challenge where participants work in teams to solve real-world cybersecurity problems. Open to security enthusiasts of all levels, from beginners to experts, this event provides a platform to develop and showcase your skills while networking with industry professionals.</p>

    <h2>Challenge Format</h2>
    <p>Teams of 2-4 participants will tackle a series of increasingly difficult cybersecurity challenges across multiple domains. The event combines elements of Capture The Flag (CTF) competitions with practical security implementation scenarios that mirror real-world situations.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Challenge Categories</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-globe" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Web Application Security</h4><div class="up-meta">Identify and exploit vulnerabilities in web applications</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-hdd-network" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Network Security</h4><div class="up-meta">Analyze and secure network infrastructure</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-key" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Cryptography</h4><div class="up-meta">Break and implement cryptographic systems</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-cpu" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Reverse Engineering</h4><div class="up-meta">Analyze compiled applications to understand their functionality</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-search" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Forensics</h4><div class="up-meta">Investigate digital evidence to reconstruct security incidents</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-people" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Social Engineering</h4><div class="up-meta">Develop strategies to counter social engineering attacks</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Schedule</h2>
    <h3>Day 1 (June 15)</h3>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto 2rem;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>08:00 - 09:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Registration and Check-in</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>09:00 - 10:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Opening Ceremony and Challenge Briefing</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>10:00 - 12:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Team Formation and Strategy Session</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>13:00 - 18:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Hacking Session</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>19:00 - 22:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Evening Workshop: "Advanced Exploitation Techniques"</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>22:00 - 08:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Overnight Hacking (Optional)</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <h3>Day 2 (June 16)</h3>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>09:00 - 12:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Continued Hacking Session</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>13:00 - 15:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Final Hacking Sprint</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>15:00 - 16:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Solution Submission Deadline</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>16:00 - 17:30</h4><div class="up-meta">Team Presentations</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>18:30 - 20:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Awards Ceremony and Closing</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Prizes and Recognition</h2>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>First Place</h3><p>Cash prize and mentorship opportunities with leading cybersecurity firms</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Second Place</h3><p>Prize and premium security tools licenses</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Third Place</h3><p>Prize and security conference tickets</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Most Innovative</h3><p>Special award for the most creative approach</p></div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Who Should Participate</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Security professionals looking to sharpen their skills</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Computer science students interested in cybersecurity careers</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Software developers wanting to improve their security knowledge</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">IT professionals seeking to enhance their security capabilities</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Security researchers and enthusiasts of all levels</div></div></div>
    </div>

    <h2 style="margin-top:3rem;">Registration Information</h2>
    <p>Registration opens on April 1, 2025. Early registration is encouraged as participation is limited to 100 participants (25-30 teams) to ensure quality mentoring and support.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Frequently Asked Questions</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Do I need to be a cybersecurity expert to participate?</h4><div class="up-meta">No, we welcome participants of all skill levels. Teams are encouraged to include members with diverse experience levels, and mentors will be available to assist throughout the event.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>What should I bring?</h4><div class="up-meta">Participants should bring their own laptops, chargers, and any preferred peripherals. We'll provide power, high-speed internet, and a comfortable workspace.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Is there a participation fee?</h4><div class="up-meta">Yes, there is a nominal registration fee to cover event costs, meals, and materials. Student discounts available.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Will accommodation be provided?</h4><div class="up-meta">Accommodation is not included, but we have arranged special rates with nearby hotels. Details will be provided to registered participants.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Can I participate remotely?</h4><div class="up-meta">This hackathon is designed as an in-person event to maximize collaboration and mentorship opportunities. Remote participation is not available.</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Ready to Test Your Cybersecurity Skills?</h2>
    <p>Join us for an intense 48-hour hackathon that will challenge your abilities and connect you with the cybersecurity community.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;">Register Interest</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
